dialog.help.title: Habdorn PDF Help
dialog.help.content:
Habdorn PDF lets you create, reorganize, and export PDF documents locally.

Getting started:

1. Add a PDF, an image, or a blank page.
2. Reorder pages by dragging the thumbnails.
3. Insert images over a page when needed.
4. Save the project as an .hpdf file to continue later.
5. Export the final document as a PDF.

.hpdf projects include the files they use internally, so they keep working even if the original files are no longer available.
dialog.shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
dialog.whats_new.title: What's New
dialog.whats_new.heading: {app} — {version}
dialog.whats_new.content:
Main improvements:

• Editable and portable .hpdf projects.
• Embedded assets independent of the original files.
• Safe project saving and opening.
• Stable Undo and Redo history.
• Modern mini ribbon with Lucide icons.
• New visual interface, welcome screen, and empty states.
• Local PDF export without uploading documents to the internet.
dialog.third_party.title: Third-party Notices
dialog.third_party.load_error: The bundled third-party notices could not be loaded.
dialog.third_party.format_error: The third-party notices are not valid text.
dialog.about.title: About {app}
dialog.about.content:
A local visual editor for creating, reorganizing, and exporting PDF documents.

Created by Habdorn.

Documents are processed locally. Habdorn PDF does not upload files to external servers.

.hpdf projects preserve the editable document and its assets.

Lucide icons, distributed under the ISC License.
